effect.name: iris
effect.description: Circular iris open from the center using a clip-path. The content expands from a point. Works as a slide transition and as a build (enter/exit).
effect.aiSpec: A circular mask opens from the center outward, revealing content from a point (and closing back to a point on leave), like a camera iris. Works as a slide transition and as a build enter/exit. Distinctive and cinematic with a strong focal-point feel. Choose it for a dramatic centered reveal; for plainer, less stylized reveals use fade, wipe, or zoom.

snippet.label: Transition: iris
snippet.description: Open this slide with a circular iris from the center.

snippet.label: Build: iris (step)
snippet.description: Reveal a range at a build step with a circular iris.
